interfaces.name: getHomeSummary
interfaces.description: Get homepage content including featured product categories, featured products, key service offerings, and header cart/quote status.

interfaces.name: getGlobalHeaderStatus
interfaces.description: Get lightweight status for global header controls, including shopping cart and quote cart counts and cart total.

interfaces.name: getProductCategories
interfaces.description: Get top-level product categories for navigation and browsing.

interfaces.name: getProductFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter options for a given product category (laptops, accessories, servers).

accessorySubcategories.description: Subcategories for accessories such as keyboards, mice, cables.

interfaces.name: searchProducts
interfaces.description: Search and filter products within a category, with sorting and pagination.

accessorySubcategoryId.description: Matches an id from accessorySubcategories in getProductFilterOptions

interfaces.name: getProductDetails
interfaces.description: Get detailed information for a single product, including specs and shipping info.

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: Internal product id from product listing or URL.

interfaces.name: addToCart
interfaces.description: Add a product to the shopping cart. Creates a cart if one does not exist.

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: Product id from product listing or detail page.

interfaces.name: getCartSummary
interfaces.description: Get the current shopping cart contents, promo status, shipping options, and totals.

interfaces.name: updateCartItemQuantity
interfaces.description: Update the quantity for an existing cart item.

parameters.name: cartItemId
parameters.description: Cart item id as returned from getCartSummary or addToCart.

interfaces.name: removeCartItem
interfaces.description: Remove an item from the shopping cart.

interfaces.name: applyPromoCodeToCart
interfaces.description: Apply a promo code such as 'SAVE10' to the current cart and recalculate totals.

interfaces.name: setCartShippingMethod
interfaces.description: Set the shipping method for the current cart and update totals.

interfaces.name: getCheckoutSummary
interfaces.description: Get a summary of the current order for the checkout page, including items, discounts, shipping, and total.

interfaces.name: submitCheckoutOrder
interfaces.description: Submit the current cart as an order after collecting billing and shipping information.

interfaces.name: getSoftwareDevelopmentOverview
interfaces.description: Get overview content for the Software Development Services page, including CRM integration section/card.

interfaces.name: getCRMIntegrationDetails
interfaces.description: Get detailed content for the CRM Integration service section.

interfaces.name: getCRMQuoteFormOptions
interfaces.description: Get options and defaults for the CRM Integration quote request form.

interfaces.name: submitSoftwareQuoteRequest
interfaces.description: Submit a software development quote request, including custom CRM integration projects.

interfaces.name: getHardwareServicesOverview
interfaces.description: Get overview of hardware services and on-site support offerings, including workstation maintenance.

interfaces.name: getMaintenanceBookingFormOptions
interfaces.description: Get options and defaults for the on-site hardware maintenance scheduling form.

interfaces.name: submitOnsiteMaintenanceBooking
interfaces.description: Submit a booking request for an on-site hardware maintenance visit.

interfaces.name: getITSupportPlans
interfaces.description: Get all managed IT support plans with features and pricing for comparison.

interfaces.name: getITSupportPlanDetails
interfaces.description: Get detailed information for a specific managed IT support plan.

interfaces.name: getITSupportSignupFormOptions
interfaces.description: Get options for the managed IT support sign-up form such as company size ranges and countries.

interfaces.name: submitITSupportSignup
interfaces.description: Submit the initial sign-up information for a selected managed IT support plan.

interfaces.name: getKnowledgeBaseSearchOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter options for the knowledge base, such as hardware models and categories.

interfaces.name: searchKnowledgeBaseArticles
interfaces.description: Search knowledge base articles by keyword and optional filters like hardware model and category.

interfaces.name: getKnowledgeBaseArticle
interfaces.description: Get full content for a knowledge base article, including recommended next steps and related articles.

parameters.name: articleId
parameters.description: Knowledge base article id from search results or saved items.

interfaces.name: getSavedArticleFolders
interfaces.description: Get existing folders for organizing saved knowledge base articles.

interfaces.name: saveKnowledgeBaseArticle
interfaces.description: Save/bookmark a knowledge base article, with optional folder selection or new folder creation.

folderId.description: Existing folder id (if saving into an existing folder).

newFolderName.description: If provided, a new folder will be created with this name.

interfaces.name: getSavedArticles
interfaces.description: Get all saved knowledge base articles, optionally grouped by folder.

interfaces.name: updateSavedArticleFolder
interfaces.description: Move a saved article to a different folder.

parameters.name: folderId
parameters.description: Target folder id, or null/empty to ungroup.

interfaces.name: deleteSavedArticle
interfaces.description: Remove a saved/bookmarked knowledge base article.

interfaces.name: searchTrainingEvents
interfaces.description: Search upcoming training sessions and webinars, optionally filtering by keyword and future dates.

interfaces.name: getTrainingEventDetails
interfaces.description: Get detailed information for a training or webinar event, including schedule and time zone.

parameters.name: eventId
parameters.description: Training event id from the events listing or URL.

interfaces.name: registerForTrainingEvent
interfaces.description: Register for a training or webinar event with attendee details, time zone, and experience level.

parameters.name: eventId
parameters.description: Event id the user is registering for.

interfaces.name: getServerBaseModels
interfaces.description: Get base server chassis/models for the custom server configurator.

interfaces.name: getServerConfigurationOptions
interfaces.description: Get configuration options (memory, storage, optional components, maintenance plans) for a selected base server model.

interfaces.name: previewServerConfiguration
interfaces.description: Calculate a price summary for a tentative custom server configuration without saving it.

parameters.name: storageOptionIds
parameters.description: Array of selected storage option ids.

interfaces.name: createServerConfiguration
interfaces.description: Create and save a custom server configuration with selected options and maintenance plan.

interfaces.name: addServerConfigurationToQuoteCart
interfaces.description: Add an existing server configuration to the quote cart. Creates a quote cart if one does not exist.

interfaces.name: getQuoteCartSummary
interfaces.description: Get the current quote cart contents, including server configurations and key specs.

interfaces.name: removeQuoteCartItem
interfaces.description: Remove an item from the quote cart.

interfaces.name: submitServerQuoteRequest
interfaces.description: Submit a formal quote request for the current quote cart contents, with basic contact information.

interfaces.name: getCompanyInfo
interfaces.description: Get general company information, capabilities, and locations for the company info page.

interfaces.name: submitContactInquiry
interfaces.description: Submit a general contact/inquiry form not covered by specific quote or booking forms.

interfaces.name: getStaticPageContent
interfaces.description: Get static content for legal pages such as Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateCart
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load the current Cart from storage or create a new open cart if none exists.

helperFunctions.name: _recalculateCartTotals
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to recompute subtotal, discounts, shipping, and total for a Cart after modifications.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateQuoteCart
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load or create the current QuoteCart for server configurations.

helperFunctions.name: _validateAndResolvePromoCode
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to validate a promo code, check applicability, and retrieve the corresponding PromoCode entity.
